story.soThat: npx prisma db seed veya npm run seed komutları çalışsın
story.tasks: 7 tasks with 28 subtasks: Add package.json scripts (AC: #1), Verify auto-run after migration (AC: #2), Enable individual seeder execution (AC: #3), Implement seed reset functionality (AC: #4), Environment-specific seeding (AC: #5), Verify progress output (AC: #6), TypeScript support verification (AC: #7)

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. package.json scripts with prisma:seed, seed, seed:reset, seed:dev, seed:test, and prisma.seed configuration 2. Auto-run after migration via prisma migrate dev 3. Individual seeder execution using ts-node 4. Clear and seed functionality via npm run seed:reset 5. Environment-specific data volume control via NODE_ENV 6. Progress output with console.log and emojis 7. TypeScript support via ts-node for .ts seed files

doc.title: Epic 13: Advanced Seeder Infrastructure
doc.snippet: As a developer, I want Prisma native seeding commands, so that npx prisma db seed veya npm run seed komutları çalışsın.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Advanced Seeder Infrastructure
doc.snippet: Prisma Integration: Native seeding via prisma.seed in package.json. Auto-runs after prisma migrate dev. TypeScript support via ts-node.

doc.title: Story 13.3: Individual Module Seeders
doc.snippet: Individual seeder classes in prisma/seeders/ directory with static seed() methods, idempotent operations, and transaction support.

doc.title: Story 13.2: Model Factory Pattern & Faker Integration
doc.snippet: Factory classes in prisma/factories/ directory with generate() and generateMany() methods using Faker.js for Turkish test data.

doc.title: Story 13.1: Prisma Native Seeding Entry Point
doc.snippet: Main prisma/seed.ts entry point with async main() function and organized seeder structure for npx prisma db seed command.

doc.title: Testing Strategy
doc.snippet: Jest testing framework with unit, integration, and E2E test patterns. Database setup for testing with cleanup between tests.

doc.title: Project Structure
doc.snippet: Prisma directory structure with schema files, migrations, and seed.ts for database initialization and test data management.

file.reason: Main seeding entry point called by package.json scripts with transaction support and error handling
Individual seeder class with static seed method for creating roles - called by seed.ts
Individual seeder class with role-permission assignments - called by seed.ts
Individual seeder class with password hashing - called by seed.ts
Individual seeder class for sample files - called by seed.ts
Individual seeder class for SMS logs - called by seed.ts
Factory class for generating user test data used by seeders
Factory class for generating role test data used by seeders
Target file for adding npm scripts and prisma.seed configuration

node.package: Prisma ORM client for database operations in seeders
Faker.js for generating realistic test data with Turkish locale
Password hashing utility for test user passwords
TypeScript execution engine for running .ts seeder files
TypeScript compiler for strict mode type checking
Testing framework for unit and integration tests

story-context.constraints: - Prisma v6.16.0+ required for native seeding support - ts-node required for TypeScript .ts file execution - All seeders must use static seed(prisma: PrismaClient) method pattern - Scripts must follow npm naming conventions - Environment variables (NODE_ENV) control seeding behavior - All seeding operations must be idempotent (safe to re-run) - Console logging with emojis (✓, 🎉, ❌) required - Individual seeders must support standalone execution - TypeScript strict mode enabled (Epic 12.4) - Import organization follows 8-category pattern (Epic 12.5)

interface.name: Factory Interface
interface.signature: static generate(overrides?: Partial<T>): T; static generateMany(count: number, overrides?: Partial<T>): T[]

tests.standards: Jest testing framework with Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. Unit tests for each seeder class. Integration tests for end-to-end seeding. beforeEach/afterEach cleanup. Mock factories for isolated testing. Test coverage target > 80%.
tests.locations: test/seeders/ for seeder unit tests. test/ for integration tests. prisma/ directory for seeders and factories.
tests.ideas: - Test AC1: Verify package.json has all 5 scripts + prisma.seed configuration - Test AC2: Run prisma migrate dev and verify auto-seeding triggers - Test AC3: Execute ts-node prisma/seeders/role.seeder.ts and verify standalone execution - Test AC4: Run npm run seed:reset and verify database reset + reseed - Test AC5: Set NODE_ENV=test and verify reduced data volume - Test AC6: Run npm run seed and verify console.log with emojis - Test AC7: Verify ts-node can compile and execute all .ts seeder files
